steps.title: Set up tangent
steps.content:
For angle $A$, tangent is opposite side over adjacent side. From the labeled triangle, the opposite side is 
$$
2\sqrt{3}
$$ and the adjacent side is $2$.
$$
\tan A=\frac{2\sqrt{3}}{2}
$$

steps.title: Simplify the ratio
steps.content: Cancel the common factor of $2$. $$ \frac{2\sqrt{3}}{2}=\sqrt{3} $$ The answer is C.
